stemHtml: Regarding instrument approach procedures, why have aircraft categories based on speed at threshold been established?

options.a: It is an aerodrome requirement for the purpose of establishing landing fees.
options.b: To differentiate between piston, turbine, and jet-powered aircraft.
options.c: To define minimum separation distances in the approach.
options.d: To relate an aircraft’s manoeuvrability to the procedure for the approach.
